# CPMessageLeadingItem

**Enumeration**

The accessories that a message list item can display in its leading region.

## Declaration

```swift
enum CPMessageLeadingItem
```

## Overview

Use these constants when creating instances of [doc://com.apple.carplay/documentation/CarPlay/CPMessageListItemLeadingConfiguration]. A leading item can provide additional context for a list item’s contents, or help communicate its behavior.

## Leading Items

- **CPMessageLeadingItem.none**: Don’t show a leading item.
- **CPMessageLeadingItem.pin**: Show a pin icon.
- **CPMessageLeadingItem.star**: Show a star icon.

## Initializers

- **init(rawValue:)**

## Getting the Leading Item

- **leadingItem**: The configuration’s item.

## Conforms To

- BitwiseCopyable
- Equatable
- Hashable
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
title: CPMessageLeadingItem
